title: helianthella majuscula
intro: Helianthella majuscula, also known as the mountain sunflower, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Herbal preparations of Helianthella majuscula can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its health benefits to be utilized in various forms.
